action.reasoning: Observation: rmse_z500 improved to 439.04 (val best 440.84 at epoch 21) with h=320/b=16 (~30M params), lat-weighted loss, 25 epochs; loss drops to ~0.02 immediately then plateaus but val RMSE improves steadily to ~441. Analysis: model capacity still limiting for full 3-day global dynamics (fast initial convergence, continued slow val gains); primary metric is Z500 so channel-weighted loss can prioritize it. Decision: scale to h=384/blocks=18 (~48M params, still safe), bs_train=20 (VRAM), lr=1e-4, epochs=20 (time ~1.5h est. within 1.88h left), add [3.0,1.0] channel weights in loss for Z500 emphasis, update defaults/hardcodes in model.py/train.py/predict.py (bs_inf=16); submit eval on new best.pt.
